title: How to pull custom Dropdown from API
excerpt: Our items have a custom Dropdown field. I am able to pull the field if I pull the item without issues. Is there a way to pull the all the possible values of a custom Dropdown from the API?

posts.author: sgdev (Steven)
posts.cookedHtml: Our items have a custom Dropdown field. I am able to pull the field if I pull the item without issues. Is there a way to pull the all the possible values of a custom Dropdown from the API?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
The settings_str in the following query returns a JSON serialized string, that contains the configuration and possible labels/indexes. Just deserialize it and you can access the labels and index mapping.

{
  boards(ids: "123123") {
    columns(ids: "dropdown") {
      settings_str
    }
  }
}

{
  "data": {
    "boards": [
      {
        "columns": [
          {
            "settings_str": "{\"limit_select\":false,\"hide_footer\":false,\"labels\":[{\"id\":1,\"name\":\"Test\"},{\"id\":2,\"name\":\"Test 2\"},{\"id\":3,\"name\":\"Test 3\"}],\"deactivated_labels\":[]}"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "account_id": 5555555
}

posts.author: sgdev (Steven)
posts.cookedHtml: This worked, thank you for the response.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @anon29275264 for the help!!
